user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the feedback and grievance notification template list, so that I can confirm the notification is configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Notification type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view the Feedback / Grievance notification template, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the feedback notification templates are listed; When I click View on the row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the feedback notification templates list, so that I always see current data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Email Templates view for feedback, so that I can manage the email channel as well
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback Notification Templates screen; When I select the Email Templates tab; Then the email templates are shown
